fetch_status: fallback_websearch_summaries (direct WebFetch firewalled by env network policy; PG essays returned 403; substack/spicytakes/aaronsw rss/ycombinator/medium all returned 403). Used WebSearch summary text as substitute.

atoms.text: Society will be split between writers and write-nots: those who choose to write as a way to clarify their thinking, and those who don't because they won't have to.
Writing is to thinking as the gym is to physical strength: before the industrial revolution manual labor made most people strong; afterward strength only survives by deliberate practice.
Managers treat subtrees of the org chart as black boxes; founder mode rejects that abstraction and routes attention through skip-level meetings into the operational details.
Founders can do things managers cannot, so the conventional MBA prescription feels broken; skip-level interactions become a normal mechanism, not an exception.
Output increases faster than input in fields with exponential growth and thresholds; the linear 'you get out what you put in' lesson taught to children is empirically wrong outside structured tests.

Superlinear returns are a feature of the world (fame, power, military victories, knowledge), not artifacts of rules people invented; understanding this concept changes how an ambitious person allocates attention.

Persistent people are attached to points high in the decision tree; obstinate people are attached to first-formulated low-level details. The persistent prune branches, the obstinate spray 'don't give up' over the whole tree.
When a problem has exactly one solution, persistence and obstinacy collapse to the same behavior; the distinction only becomes observable as the problem's branching factor grows.
Start-up readiness in adolescents is built by getting good at technology, working on hard projects you enjoy, and developing taste for what's broken in the world.

Once a population can offload writing to AI, the fraction who write declines, and with it the fraction who think in the structured way writing imposes; this is an energy_constraint outcome on collective cognition.
Brian Chesky at Airbnb is a working example of founder mode, replacing the manager-mode abstraction with direct context routing into the org's operational core.
Two mechanisms produce superlinear returns: exponential growth (where the curve compounds) and thresholds (where you only get the prize if you cross the line at all).
